name: aionis-core-workspace
description: Aionis Core kernel for learned kickoff, structured handoff, replay, governance, and execution memory.

scripts.docs:check: node scripts/sync-core-path.mjs --check && node scripts/ci/docs-reference-check.mjs && npm run -s docs:build
scripts.packages:release:check: npm run -s aionis-doc:release:check && npm run -s sdk:release:check && npm run -s runtime-core:release:check && npm run -s runtime:release:check
scripts.inspector:dev: npm run -s ui-kit:build && npm --prefix apps/inspector run dev
scripts.inspector:build: npm run -s ui-kit:build && npm --prefix apps/inspector run build
scripts.inspector:typecheck: npm run -s ui-kit:build && npm --prefix apps/inspector run typecheck
scripts.playground:dev: npm run -s ui-kit:build && npm --prefix apps/playground run dev
scripts.playground:build: npm run -s ui-kit:build && npm --prefix apps/playground run build
scripts.playground:typecheck: npm run -s ui-kit:build && npm --prefix apps/playground run typecheck
scripts.lite:test: node --test scripts/ci/lite-startup-contract.test.mjs scripts/ci/lite-source-scope.test.mjs scripts/ci/lite-release-baseline.test.mjs && npx tsx --test
